headline: Webhook reliability, compliance, and audit improvements.

themes.user_facing_summary: Fixed critical issues with webhook delivery that were causing duplicate events on retries. Webhook delivery failures now surface in the activity log, so you can see exactly what succeeded and what failed without checking server logs.
supporting_changes: Fix duplicate webhook delivery on retry by respecting idempotency key
Surface webhook delivery failures in the activity log UI
Document the idempotency-key contract for webhook subscribers

themes.user_facing_summary: Custom retention policies now available per workspace (default 90 days), allowing you to meet SOC 2, HIPAA, and other regulatory requirements without a fixed retention constraint.
supporting_changes: Allow custom retention policies per workspace (default 90 days)

themes.user_facing_summary: Billing reports can now be exported as CSV, and audit log timezone handling is now correct, saving compliance teams hours of manual reconciliation.
supporting_changes: Add CSV export to billing reports
Correct timezone handling in audit log CSV export

themes.user_facing_summary: Fixed a race condition that could occur when two admins edited the same role concurrently, preventing accidental overwrites of permission changes.
supporting_changes: Resolve race condition when two admins edit the same role concurrently

notable_changes: Webhook idempotency fix prevents duplicate event delivery and double-billing
Custom retention policies per workspace for SOC 2 and HIPAA compliance
Webhook delivery failures now visible in activity log for easier debugging
Billing reports and audit logs exportable as CSV
customer_voice: Enterprise customers flagged webhook retries as a billing and SOC 2 audit risk, compliance teams need configurable retention to meet regulatory requirements, and audit departments are looking for ways to reduce manual compliance reporting overhead.
